[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011110 4
1 0101000110 4
2 0000111000 3
3 1011100011 6
4 0101000111 5
5 0110111111 8
6 1011111111 9
7 0010101011 5

01 10 0101111110 7
12 21 1011111011 8
23 32 1011100011 6 match 3
34 43 0110100111 6
45 54 0111111111 9
56 65 0011111111 8
67 76 0010111110 6
70 07 0101011110 6

02 20 1111100111 8
13 31 0000111001 4
24 42 1111100111 8
35 53 0011111101 7
46 64 0110101111 7
57 75 0011111111 8
60 06 0111101110 7
71 17 0000111110 5

14 41 0110111111 8 match 5
25 52 1011111111 9 match 6
36 63 0010101011 5 match 7

50 05 0111111111 9
61 16 0010111010 5
72 27 1011111111 9 match 6

15 51 0011111101 7
26 62 1011101011 7
37 73 0000011111 5
